Fresh, Local, Quality Food

Welcome to Fullys Fresh Food! Enjoy our delicious, locally-sourced dishes made fresh daily.

About us


At Fullys Fresh Food, it’s all about good food and friendly faces. What started as a small, family-run business has grown over time, expanding while still holding onto the same values it was built on. With a real passion for quality produce, the shop brings together fresh, high-quality meats with a tasty range of deli favourites and homemade options. Proud to be part of the Middlesbrough community, Fullys Fresh Food continues to grow while keeping that personal, local touch—where customers are always welcomed, served with a smile, and can count on great food they can trust every time.

See what others are saying about us!

New Sunday roast

Introducing our new Sunday roast! Available every Sunday from 11am to 3pm, our Sunday roast is the perfect way to enjoy a delicious, home-cooked meal without the hassle of cooking yourself. Made with locally sourced ingredients and cooked to perfection, our Sunday roast is sure to satisfy your cravings and leave you feeling satisfied. Whether you're looking for a hearty meal to share with family or a comforting dish to enjoy on your own, our Sunday roast is the perfect choice. Don't miss out on this delicious new offering - come in and try it today or order for delivery!


Disclaimer: Please note that this is a new service and for the time being is only available for delivery via phone orders. This will change in the future.

Contact us!
